task_completion.description: Agent logged into the FreeMED system using the provided credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeMED dashboard or home screen is visible, indicating a successful login as 'admin'.

task_completion.description: Agent navigated to the system-wide immunization dictionary.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screen showing the 'Immunizations', 'Vaccines', or 'Dictionary' module within the FreeMED interface.

task_completion.description: Agent initiated the process to add a new vaccine entry.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An empty or partially filled form for adding a new immunization or vaccine entry is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Agent entered the correct vaccine name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'RSV vaccine, adjuvanted' is visible in the vaccine name or description input field.

task_completion.description: Agent entered the correct CVX code.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The number '212' is visible in the CVX code input field.

task_completion.description: Agent set the vaccine status to 'Active'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dropdown, checkbox, or radio button for status is clearly set to 'Active'.

task_completion.description: Agent saved the new vaccine dictionary entry.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message confirming the addition, or the new entry 'RSV vaccine, adjuvanted' with CVX '212' appearing in the saved list of immunizations.

integrity.description: Agent used the FreeMED graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser with the FreeMED application open, rather than a terminal window executing SQL commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual FreeMED application fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs ('RSV vaccine, adjuvanted', '212') are typed into the actual FreeMED web forms, not into a separate text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: Agent demonstrated a natural progression of steps without spoofing the final state.
integrity.visual_evidence: The sequence of screenshots shows navigating, typing into fields, and clicking save, rather than a sudden jump to a completed screen which might indicate HTML manipulation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires adding a vaccine exactly named 'RSV vaccine, adjuvanted' with CVX code '212' and status 'Active'. Note: While real-world CDC records map CVX 212 to the Janssen COVID-19 vaccine, this is a synthetic scenario. You must strictly verify that the agent entered the fabricated code '212' for the RSV vaccine as requested by the task description.
